text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
What?! A birthday card?! 
For me? From you?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Mhm. I remembered when I saw Rudolf 
wishing you a happy birthday earlier, 
so it's a bit last minute.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh, only you would admit that 
to the birthday girl's face.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's not just a card. It comes with 
a present too. See what it says.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
"School turf, 2400 m, see you
at the starting gate." Wait, you're
telling me I get to race you?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Oh, if we go now, you also 
get a bonus Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text: For real?! I get to race you and Rudolf?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What will I ever do with you two… How could 
I say no after seeing such jubilant anticipation
on your faces?

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Aw, yeah!! This is the best birthday present 
ever!! Thanks, C.B.!!! Thanks, Rudolf!!!
